summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of redesigned Vargas y Zúñiga site (carey.cl-inspired). All 16 requested scenarios verified end-to-end via Playwright on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Hero loads with dark background, white diagonal slash and 'JUSTICIA Y DEBER' (ES default). Hero rotator works via hero-prev/hero-next/hero-dot-0..2 and the slide-3 hero-cta opens the embedded chat widget (vyz-widget-panel gains vyz-open). Lang toggle ES/EN works and persists across reload via localStorage. Sticky header + all 6 nav links smooth-scroll to sections. Studio, Stats (6 tiles stat-0..5), Practice Areas accordion (personas open by default, single-open behavior verified via opacity transition, litigios shows 8 sub-items area-item-litigios-0..7), Team quote + Team detail with team-card-0/1 and team-email-0/1, Insights (3 cards), Contact section with phone +56 9 7987 3921 and both emails, contact-chat-cta opens the embedded widget, footer with language toggle + back-to-top, mobile menu at 390x844 shows all 6 nav links. Emergent badge is NOT present in DOM. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx and Contact.jsx both define an identical openChat() helper (duplicate code). Extract to a shared util e.g. /app/frontend/src/lib/openChat.js to follow DRY.

PracticeAreas.jsx accordion: collapsed rows use gridTemplateRows: 0fr + opacity:0 but inner items still render in DOM (li elements have non-zero bounding height). Functionality is correct (single-open verified via opacity), but adding aria-hidden={!isOpen} and visibility:hidden on the inner wrapper when collapsed would improve a11y/SEO and make automated visibility assertions reliable.

Hero useEffect interval (7s auto-rotate) does not reset when the user manually changes slide via dots/arrows — clicking hero-dot-2 then the auto-advance may fire <1s later. Consider resetting the interval on idx change (clear+set inside the effect deps).
Header.jsx logo links to #top (works correctly as the hero section has id='top').
All required data-testid attributes are present across Hero, Header, Studio, Stats, PracticeAreas, Team (both team-quote-section and team-detail-section), Insights, Contact and Footer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single-page marketing site at https://vargas-zuniga-legal.preview.emergentagent.com/. Embedded chat widget is loaded from https://vargasyzuniga.onrender.com/widget.js (defer) — needs ~1-3s to attach #vyz-widget-launcher. Chat CTAs (hero-cta on slide 3 and contact-chat-cta) trigger launcher.click() and #vyz-widget-panel gains 'vyz-open'. Default lang ES, persisted in localStorage key 'vyz-lang'. PracticeAreas accordion uses CSS grid 0fr/1fr trick — to assert single-open behavior in tests, query computed style opacity on .grid.transition-all inside [data-testid=area-{id}] (opacity ~0 when closed, 1 when open). Mobile nav-link-* testids exist in both Header (hidden at <md) and inside [data-testid=mobile-menu] — when scoping mobile assertions, query inside [data-testid=mobile-menu] descendants. Emergent badge is hidden via CSS in /app/frontend/src/index.css and not present in DOM.
